Expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and statistical modeling with a focus on NLP and computer vision applications. Published researcher with 12+ peer-reviewed papers and a track record of deploying ML models that generated $20M+ in annual revenue impact.

data.description: Lead data scientist for the recommendation systems team serving 50M+ users
highlights: Designed and deployed a transformer-based recommendation engine that increased user engagement by 35%
Built an A/B testing framework used across 15+ product teams
Led a team of 4 data scientists and 2 ML engineers

data.description: Core data scientist for predictive healthcare analytics platform
highlights: Developed patient readmission prediction model achieving 0.89 AUC
Built NLP pipeline for extracting insights from 10M+ clinical notes using BERT-based models

achievements: Dissertation: 'Bayesian Methods for High-Dimensional Causal Inference'

data.title: Causal Transformers: Attention Mechanisms for Causal Inference
Fair Recommendation Systems: A Multi-Stakeholder Approach

Reduced deployment time from 2 hours to 5 minutes by implementing GitOps
Decreased AWS costs by 40% ($2M annually)

highlights: Migrated legacy on-premise infrastructure to AWS, reducing operational overhead by 60%
Implemented SOC 2 and PCI-DSS compliant CI/CD pipelines
